description: During the inspection period, a buyer decides to terminate the purchase contract due to major structural issues found.

nodes.task_description: Advise the buyer on their right to terminate under the inspection contingency.

expected_outcome.expected: The buyer understands their contractual right to cancel.

nodes.task_description: Draft a formal notice of termination and a request for the return of the earnest money deposit.

expected_outcome.expected: A legally sound termination notice is generated.

nodes.task_description: Send the termination notice to the listing agent and the title company to initiate the earnest money refund process.

expected_outcome.expected: All parties are notified of the termination, and the process to refund the deposit begins.
